description_long: This helmet is constructed from dark, matte-finished metal panels, joined together with rows of visible rivets that add both structural integrity and a rugged aesthetic. The dome-shaped crown is reinforced by a prominent central ridge running from front to back, flanked by additional riveted bands. A wide, slightly curved brim extends forward to form a protective visor, while cheek guards and a rear neck guard are attached with stitched leather trim, providing extra coverage and comfort. The surface shows subtle wear and patina, suggesting durability and use. The overall design is reminiscent of historical or medieval combat helmets, with a utilitarian and robust appearance.
description: A dark, riveted metal helmet with a central ridge, forward brim, and stitched leather-trimmed cheek and neck guards. The surface is matte and slightly worn, evoking a historical combat style.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the central ridge, rivet lines, and the full extent of the forward brim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved cheek guard, stitched leather trim, and the layered construction of the helmet.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the central ridge, symmetrical cheek guards, and the open face area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the cheek and neck guards and rivet details.
